estimatePriority: current Tripo workspace or API metadata when available in the active tool context
fallbackRuleWhenExactCreditsUnknown: Do not invent an exact per-task credit amount. Say that the current official docs confirm credit-based billing, 2,000 free credits on first API key generation, and $0.01 per additional credit, but do not provide a verified exact per-task credit figure in the currently verified sources.
confirmationRule: Always ask for approval before spending Tripo credits. Include the credit estimate when available. Otherwise say that the exact per-task credit amount is not verified from the current official docs.
